author: Jdthomas24
description: Hubitat driver for Moonraker/Klipper 3D printers. Monitor print status, temperatures, and progress via live dashboard tiles. Start, pause, resume, and cancel prints directly from Hubitat or any automation rule. Supports Sonicpad multi-printer setups and standard Raspberry Pi/BTT installs.
releaseNotes: v1.0.46 - Fixed repeated 'printer is online' log spam during standby and printing. setOnline() and setOffline() now correctly persist healthStatus so the duplicate-check works. Added 'Suppress routine poll logs' preference (default ON) — silences the heartbeat log during all print states. Critical events (print complete, error, filament runout, state changes, going offline) always log regardless of this setting.
